name: MANNATECH INC
business: Mannatech develops and sells innovative, high quality, proprietary nutritional supplements, skin care and anti-aging products, and weight-management products that target optimal health and wellness. The company sells its products in three regions: the Americas, Europe/the Middle East/Africa, and Asia/Pacific, as well as to customers in additional countries. Products are sold principally through network marketing distribution channels via independent associates and preferred customers, with a non-direct selling e-commerce model in mainland China.
sellsTo: Consumers in China via cross-border e-commerce

exposures.sentence: We develop and sell innovative, high quality, proprietary nutritional supplements, skin care and anti-aging products, and weight-management products that target optimal health and wellness.
We utilize advanced artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms and technologies to enhance various aspects of our operations.

tamClaims.claim: 104 million global direct sellers generated annual retail sales of $163.9 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the worldwide direct sales data published by the World Federation of Direct Selling Associations, in 2024, approximately 104 million global direct sellers collectively generated annual retail sales of $163.9 billion.
